name: American Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar until well combined.
3. Add the butter and mix with your hands until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Make a well in the center and add the eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition until just combined.
5. Pour in the milk and stir until the batter is smooth.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch round baking pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
